note: photonic interposer, pre-commercial — early-winner PATTERN, but the pipeline reads no moat ($1M rev, 1684x sales, -3550% op margin) and flags it speculative. Locks the agent-handoff: pipeline caps to HOLD, the agent judges the optical thesis upward. NOTE: its HARD speculative_cap_applied=True is an intentional handoff lock, not a grade floor — if a future L3 improvement legitimately recognizes the optical bottleneck and the cap stops firing, that HARD miss is a RE-BLESS-worthy improvement, not a regression to revert.
